# Raulji Group

> India's trusted holding company offering business consulting, IT services, insurance advisory, financial services, and legal support. Building futures since 2009.

## About

Raulji Group is a diversified holding company headquartered in Vadodara, Gujarat, India. Founded by Dharmendrasinh Raulji and the Raulji Brothers and Sons, the group operates across multiple business verticals including business consulting, information technology, insurance, finance, legal advisory, digital marketing, and land investment.

- 15+ years of experience
- 500+ clients served
- 7+ business verticals
- 100+ team members

## Services

- **Business Consulting**: Company registration (Pvt Ltd, LLP, OPC), GST, compliance, startup support, business strategy — https://www.raulji.com/services/consulting
- **IT Services**: Website development, mobile apps, SaaS, AI & automation, cloud solutions, ERP — https://www.raulji.com/services/it
- **Insurance Services**: General, health, life, motor, commercial, property, industrial insurance with claims support — https://www.raulji.com/services/insurance
- **Finance Advisory**: Tax planning, GST filing, investment advisory, wealth management, audit — https://www.raulji.com/services/finance
- **Legal Advisory**: Corporate law, contract drafting, IP registration, dispute resolution — https://www.raulji.com/services/legal
- **Digital Solutions**: Website development, SEO, digital marketing, branding, social media — https://www.raulji.com/services/digital
- **Land Investment**: Land investment advisory in Vadodara & Anand districts, Gujarat — https://www.raulji.com/services/land-investment
- **Computer Rentals**: Laptop, desktop, monitor rental in Vadodara with pan-India delivery — https://www.raulji.com/rentals
